name: Multi-Client Ad Intelligence & Risk Monitoring System

parameters.name: query
parameters.value: SELECT campaign.name, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.clicks, metrics.conversions, metrics.all_conversions_value, metrics.average_cpc, metrics.ctr FROM campaign WHERE segments.date DURING LAST_7_DAYS

parameters.jsCode:
// Simulate Meta Ads data with realistic structure
const metaSimulated = [
  {
    source: 'meta',
    client_name: 'Acme Corp',
    campaign_name: 'Acme - Summer Sale 2024',
    spend: 4200,
    clicks: 8400,
    conversions: 210,
    revenue: 16800,
    cpc: 0.50,
    ctr: 3.2,
    roas: 4.0
  },
  {
    source: 'meta',
    client_name: 'BlueWave Agency',
    campaign_name: 'BlueWave - Lead Gen Q4',
    spend: 3100,
    clicks: 4200,
    conversions: 62,
    revenue: 4960,
    cpc: 0.74,
    ctr: 1.8,
    roas: 1.6
  },
  {
    source: 'meta',
    client_name: 'TechStart Inc',
    campaign_name: 'TechStart - Brand Awareness',
    spend: 1800,
    clicks: 9000,
    conversions: 90,
    revenue: 5400,
    cpc: 0.20,
    ctr: 4.5,
    roas: 3.0
  }
];

return metaSimulated.map(item => ({ json: item }));

// Simulate Google Ads data with realistic structure
const googleSimulated = [

  {

    spend: 7800,

    conversions: 468,

return googleSimulated.map(item => ({ json: item }));
